creator: eno@pdxconnect.com
text:
First, we're not sure why the above isp.html page directs us to enter a "problem report" about this... it says:

"If your company supports a FreeBSD-compatible product or service that should be added to this page, please fill out a problem report for category www. Submissions should be in HTML and a medium-sized paragraph in length."

But anyway, since there's no other obvious place to send this, here it is:

You list Computer Magic and Software Design as a Freebsd hosting provider; however, in viewing their page, they're proud to offer "Fast Linux Servers!" and no mention of FreeBSD.

http://www.cmagic.biz/wordpress/web-hosting/

Thanks,

eno

Fix: 

Remove Computer Magic and Software from the vendor list.
How-To-Repeat: View http://www.freebsd.org/commercial/isp.html
